brenna.name: Brenna
brenna.title: Guildmaster
brenna.description: Hard-eyed and careful. Has sent more adventurers to their deaths than she will ever admit.

tomas.name: Tomas
tomas.title: Innkeeper of the Whispering Hollow
tomas.description: Polite to a fault. Remembers every guest who never came down for breakfast.

vira.name: Vira
vira.title: Merchant
vira.description: Prices fair, weights honest, smile unreadable.

orric.name: Orric
orric.title: Forester of Greenhollow
orric.description: Older than the guild that sends people past his door. Keeps an axe across his knees and a silence in his answers.
